allow: Bash(timeout 8 node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); require\('mongoose'\).connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('OK'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.log\('FAIL:', e.message.split\('\\n'\)[0]\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
